questionHtml: An allotrope of molecular oxygen is ozone. Compare, giving a reason, the bond enthalpies of the O to O bonds in O2 and O3.
markschemeHtml:
bond in O3 has lower enthalpy AND bond order is 1.5 «not 2»    [✔]

 

Note: Accept “bond in ozone is longer”.

meta.title: An allotrope of molecular oxygen is ozone. Compare, giving a reason, the bond enthalpies of the O to O bonds in O2 and O3.
